ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, newly created markdown files receive tags from the matching folder rule.
ast.target: 启用后，新创建的 Markdown 文件将从匹配的文件夹规则接收标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a folder rule with comma-separated tags.
ast.target: 创建一个包含逗号分隔标签的文件夹规则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path is relative to the vault root. Tags are comma-separated.
ast.target: 文件夹路径相对于保险库根目录。标签以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Apply tags when new files are created
ast.target: 创建新文件时应用标签

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a note in the target folder first.
ast.target: 请先在目标文件夹中打开一个笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not resolve the current folder.

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已跳过非 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No configured tag rule matches the current folder.
ast.target: 当前文件夹没有匹配的标签规则。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No markdown files found in the current folder.
ast.target: 当前文件夹中未找到 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Apply configured tags to files in the current folder
ast.target: 将配置的标签应用到当前文件夹中的文件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开自动文件夹标签设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure folder-based tag rules. New markdown files inherit tags from the longest matching folder rule.
ast.target: 配置基于文件夹的标签规则。新的 Markdown 文件将继承来自最长匹配文件夹规则的标签。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No rules yet. Add a rule such as Inbox -> tag1, tag2.
ast.target: 暂无规则。请添加规则，例如 收件箱 -> 标签1, 标签2。
